Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The model sequence is receive order then check inventory then either successful subtree or cancel subtree then close order again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Because the successful subtree uses parallel over authorize payment package items and ship order the model accepts any ordering of those three activities as long as all occur

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So a trace such as Receive Order Check Inventory Authorize Payment Ship Order Package Items Close Order is accepted by the model

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This trace is problematic because in the domain package items must happen before ship order and shipping before packaging violates the natural order to cash logic

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Also the model places close order inside the cancel branch and again after the xor which suggests it may also allow a double close in the cancel path
